title: Accuracy
description: Proximity of Measurement results to the accepted Value; precision is the degree to which repeated or reproducible measurements under unchanged conditions show the same results.

definitions.definition: Proximity of Measurement results to the accepted Value; precision is the degree to which repeated or reproducible measurements under unchanged conditions show the same results.
definitions.notes: - In essence, Accuracy reflects how close measurements are to the accepted Value, while precision gauges the reliability and consistency of those measurements.
